item.title: Mini Iceland Video Dunp
item.description:
Credit sanxyra Yes she is very pretty. No she doesn't do science.
Credit greipjokes Yes he's very pretty. No he doesn't do science.
Shamelessly stolen from Instagram so you don't have to go there. Which one was your favorite, and why was it one of the videos with the cleavage?

item.dc:creator: awesomeoldguy

item.title: I'll take what is fascism for $500 Alex
item.description: Trump has praised Kim jong-un, Putin, and Xi for years. 2 days, vote.org Do your part, I did. FP: I voted for Harris not only because I support human rights such as women's rights, LGBTQIA+ rights, black rights, indigenous peoples rights, immigrant rights, and everybody else marginalized. Personally, The Pact Act saved my life. I made 100% permanent and total disabled veteran. Who is facing a houseless situation within 3 months. I voted for Harris because I would like to have a future, and possibly own a small modest home. I voted Harris because I was a former Intelligence analyst, and I value the integrity and sanctity of the oval office. Which was treated abysmally the first time under Trump. And now she wants to hand the keys to the country to our adversaries. Why did you vote? Let me know down below.

item.title: We went to Japan earlier this year. We made it a point to try as many different ramen places as possible.
item.description:
Ichiran
Instant ramen from the "International Food Court" in the Cup Noodles museum in Yokohama
Engine Ramen, Kyoto
Kitsune soba (not ramen, I know), Miyako Soba, Kyoto
Okinawa soba from Miyako Soba, Kyoto (we had this for breakfast almost every day we were there...)
Sugari, Kyoto (my 3rd favorite pick)
Sugari, Kyoto
Ichiran again (don't remember which location, they're all pretty much the same)
Ramen War, Kyoto
Kura Sushi (the sushi was fun, the ramen was just ok)
Ippudo, Ueno, Tokyo
Yoroiya Ramen, Asakusa, Tokyo (every egg has two yolks!)
Ippudo, Ueno, Tokyo
Kasaoka Ramen Taketonbo, Tokyo
Kasaoka Ramen Takentanbo, Tokyo
Ramen Kikanbō, Kanda, Tokyo
Ramen Kikanbō, Kanda, Tokyo
Men Mitsui, near Kappabashi Street, Tokyo
Men Mitsui, near Kappabashi Street, Tokyo
Rokurinsha, Haneda Airport (sadly the only tsukemen I had on the trip)
Kaotan Ramen, near Roppongi, Tokyo (my close 2nd favorite pick)
Kaotan Ramen, near Roppongi, Tokyo
Ramen Nagi, Golden Gai, Tokyo (my overall #1 favorite pick)
Ramen Nagi, Golden Gai, Tokyo

oh my
Conservatives will do anything but accept the effects of Climate change.
Me: every morning
I am one of them, please Fuck Off.
I like pretty lights but yeah
lomf
aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa
Yes.
:O
Poyo
>:(
Mood
BALLS
I spent the day watching Air Disaster Videos
owo
Why is trump's tan getting worse?
owo
She's waiting for her Girlfriend.

item.title: Memes vol 401
item.description:
I’m so stupid it’s unbelievable. My dad told me it’s because all I think about is my boyfriend
Ok so my video dump didn’t go viral and this needs to be seen so here’s Jeremy Jordan again
Me
I’m always a silly goose. I did shrooms the other night with my boyfriend and I was talking a lot and the guy who gave us the shrooms went “did they kick in or is she always like this?” And yeah I’m always like that. So it turns out shrooms elevate what you’re already feeling but unfortunately I was feeling horny so uh… yeah
WSS definitely took inspo from this
This is from West Side Story on Broadway 2020
Cowabummer
I have a ton of this artists prints
Scruffy tax- I’ve started using this as a reaction image
Froggy and Liza Jane tax
Nessie tax

I believe everybody should watch Cabaret once- especially now. It’s so important

item.dc:creator: BlasphemousJones

item.title: Three years later, I finally passed my last test!
item.description:
4 national exams and one state exam! I finally passed the state exam on my second try yesterday! It's taken me three years to finally get here! (To be fair, I got married and bought a house during those three years, so I've been busy. Also I'm a bad test taker so one of the tests took me three tries)
Unfortunately in order to actually get my license I need to pay $700. I'm currently the only breadwinner in my family and am in the hole due to vet bills, mortgage, etc. I've paid over $5k to take these tests over the past three years. Test council record cost: $150 per year Section 1: $350 Section 2: $350 Section 3: $625 - failed first try Section 3: $625 - passed second try Section 4: $625 - failed first try Section 4: $625 - failed second try by 10 points Section 4: $625 - passed third try State exam: $450 - failed first try by 4 points State exam: $450 - passed second try Fingerprinting cost: - $69 (50 for DOJ and 19 for the company that took my fingerprints) License cost: $700 for two years Total: Almost $6k over the past 3 years. My wallet hurts
I would just like to actually *get* my license. Screaming into the void! I am both very proud of myself for finally getting here, and extremely tired!
Dog tax. Strudel is a very good girl, even if she costs me much money in vet bills
item.dc:creator: thatprickleypear

item.title: Phone Rescue Operation
item.description: The irony is that my wife was on the bus to teach our 14yo the dos and don'ts of public transit. "Definitely don't do what I just did."

item.dc:creator: HotPinkk

item.title: Memes and stuff: "huh it's Sunday, I got an extra hour of sleep and didn't even notice it." Edition
item.description:
For the Americans out there, vote, please. To fix all our problems, we'll need to do more than vote, but voting helps us get to a point where we can make real change.
My partner was telling me about smegma and his thoughts on the habit of circumcision in the USA.
Me
I might have gone to my prom if that's what was going on. I didn't feel like paying $75 a ticket (I live in a rich district while being lower middle class. I wouldn't have gone even of I did have a date that would pay for the tickets) For me to be around a lot of people I don't like. My ex went to her prom and hated it.
Thanks, @magnus810, for improperly trying to explain this meme. Is this petty of me, yes. The again I'm at the end of my period, and I'm just kinda annoyed. Someone tried to explain one of the memes I stole to me.
Sent to my partner.
Oh shit she only got two titties tho.
One of my besties is dating a terrible guy, but she has been single for a long time. Every week, she breaks up with him now because he's garbage. But I'm a supportive friend, so I try to keep her positive.
I have a the pic of art signed by David Howard Thornton and Damien Leone from when the 2nd movie came out. One of my fave things. The social media I've seen with David Howard Thorton is so fun and wholesome.
My partner now gets this after making him watch the thing (1982). One of my fave movies.
No thanks, lol
I'm a masochist, so yes.
My transmasc friend is now sending me transmasc memes because I've shown I've absorbed enough references.
The bratty neurodivergent in me has done unhinged stuff from time to time. Especially when I'm unmedicated.
I wish I was that confident.
100%
When my partner is feeling down. (I already send him pics of my boobs when he's at work from time to time.)
Suuuurrrrreeeeeee
Is me
I'm a Balrog too!!! Sweet!!!!
My favorite thing to say: make me.
A good philosophy.
I've been mostly with women, I forgot how men never truly escape some of the thought processes of a 12 year old.
I guess last night I stunk out my partner from the bedroom in my sleep because my fart stunk so bad.
I'm both for and against this idea. We need to eat healthy, but we also need to enjoy what we eat.
I learned this lesson a long time ago, and it still never gets easy.
That's what I say when I'm ready for bed.
I love all animals, but cats I just vibe with.
I'm on the asexual spectrum (demisexual). Sex is fun, and I enjoy it, but it's not needed for a relationship for me. So when my partner and I do have sex, it's mostly just us trying to make the other feel really good.
Real "pro-life" stuff. Controlling peoples bodies is not cool.
Dark
I only became religious when I was younger because I knew I was different and struggled to find a community. I thought church was a good place to be accepted. It took a lot of admitting things to myself that I eventually became the queer af atheistic little brat I am today.
They are pretty cute.
item.dc:creator: wonkysaurusrex
